# DataWidget® for Web-to-Print

> Patented (U.S. Patents 12,482,026 + 10,102,557) embeddable mailing-list builder for web-to-print, postcard, EDDM, and direct-mail platforms. Drops into your audience-selection step in 30 seconds. White-label per affiliate. Three-panel UI: AI chat assistant, interactive Leaflet map, demographic filters. 250M+ U.S. consumers, 18M+ businesses, sourced from Experian® and Equifax®, USPS CASS-certified.

## Reference site
- https://www.thedatawidget.com/ (legacy reference, live since 2018)
- https://www.thedatawidget.com/try-it (canonical sandbox)

## Live working example
- https://datawidget-banner-production.up.railway.app/widget?affiliatecode=banner

## Backend integration spec (legacy widget v1.5)
- Embed: `<script src="https://test.leadsplease.com/lp_widget_1.5.js">` + `new LeadsPlease.Widget({...})`
- Conclusion webhook: `POST conclusionurl` with XML payload (list_criteria_id, list_type, qty, price_retail, price_wholesale, session_id)
- Fulfillment: `POST /affiliatecode/get_list?u=<usr>&p=<pwd>&list_criteria_id=<id>` — returns PENDING → READY
- Polling cadence: no more than every 30s on the same URL
- Download: signed CSV URL valid 14 days
- Test mode: append `&test=true` for free anonymized data

## Multi-tenant pricing
- `datasetkey` parameter selects per-customer pricing/demographic config under one affiliatecode

## Pricing (two tiers)
- Standard: $499/mo — embed, white-label XML, 50K count calls/mo, all 4 list types, Subscriptions + Intent Data, 99.9% SLA
- Enterprise: custom — OEM, dedicated infra, below-standard per-record rates
- Records bill at LP per-record data rates from affiliate XML — no order minimum on widget orders (unlike the website's $125-$300 minimum)

## Audience
- Postcard SaaS, EDDM tools, real-estate marketing platforms, multi-location franchise platforms, multi-channel orchestration platforms, B2B ABM platforms

## Support
- tech@leadsplease.com — (866) 306-8674
